caption: The video features a woman with shoulder-length black hair and glasses, wearing a light green top with floral embroidery around the neckline. She is seated against a plain black background, which creates a stark contrast with her attire. The woman appears to be speaking or presenting, as suggested by the microphone clipped to her top. The setting suggests a formal or instructional context, possibly a lecture or online course, given the presence of the NPTEL logo in the bottom left corner of the frame.
